description_long: This is a classic drip coffee machine with a rectangular, boxy body and a front-facing control panel labeled 'MR. COFFEE'. The front panel features two red switches, likely for power and brewing functions, and a central spout above a circular hot plate intended for a coffee pot. The machine is primarily gray with a slightly darker area around the hot plate and spout. The top has a recessed area, likely for water input, covered by a transparent or translucent lid. The sides and back are plain, with the back showing a small label, and there are no visible cords or additional attachments. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function over decorative elements.
description: A gray, boxy drip coffee machine with a front control panel, hot plate, and a recessed water reservoir on top. The design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'MR. COFFEE' logo, two red switches, central spout, and circular hot plate.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, solid side and the profile of the hot plate and spout area.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain back with a small label near the bottom and the top water reservoir.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a clear view of the side profile and hot plate area.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'MR. COFFEE' logo is visible on the front control panel, centered above the switches and spout, in black text on a white background.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel features two rectangular red switches symmetrically placed on either side of the central logo and spout, with simple labeling above each switch.
